name: Expatriate — Departure Tax Return with Form T1243 and T1161
description: Complete Chloe Tremblay's 2024 Canadian emigrant tax return. Her tax documents are located at C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\TaxDocuments\tremblay\. Save the completed return as 'chloe_tremblay.24t' in C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\.

metadata.data_source: CRA Guide T4058 (Non-Residents and Income Tax) and Form T1243
metadata.key_complexity: Part-year resident (emigrated Aug 15); Deemed disposition of non-registered assets on Form T1243; Identification of exempt assets (RRSP, TFSA, Real Estate); Form T1161 reporting
